channel.title: Hidden Japan Tokyo
channel.description: Recent content on Hidden Japan Tokyo

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get in Touch

Have a question about traveling in Japan? Found an error in one of our guides? Want to share a hidden gem we haven’t covered yet?

We’d love to hear from you.

Email: contact@hidden-japan.tokyo

We aim to respond within 2–3 business days.

What We Can Help With

  • Travel questions — We’re happy to share advice about specific destinations covered on this site
  • Corrections — If you’ve visited a place we’ve written about and something has changed, please let us know
  • Suggestions — Know a hidden spot in Japan that deserves more attention? Tell us about it
  • Media & partnerships — For collaboration inquiries, please include details about your project

About Hidden Japan Tokyo

Hidden Japan Tokyo is an independent travel guide focused on lesser-known destinations across Japan — the kind of places that don’t make the front page of guidebooks but reward travelers who seek them out.

item.title: Explore by Region
item.description:
Find hidden destinations across Japan’s main regions. Each link takes you to all guides for that area.

Tohoku 東北

Aomori, Akita, Iwate, Miyagi, Yamagata, Fukushima

→ See all Tohoku guides

Kanto 関東

Tokyo, Kanagawa, Chiba, Saitama, Ibaraki, Tochigi, Gunma

→ See all Kanto guides

Chubu 中部

Niigata, Nagano, Yamanashi, Shizuoka, Aichi, Gifu, Toyama, Ishikawa, Fukui

→ See all Chubu guides

Kansai 関西

Osaka, Kyoto, Hyogo, Nara, Wakayama, Shiga, Mie

→ See all Kansai guides

item.title: Explore by Theme
item.description:
Find hidden Japan by what you love to do. Each link takes you to all guides on that theme.

Onsen 温泉

Hot spring towns, ryokan stays, and bathing culture

→ See all Onsen guides

Temples & Shrines 寺社

Historic temples, mountain shrines, and pilgrimage routes

→ See all Temples & Shrines guides

Castle Towns 城下町

Feudal castle towns, samurai districts, and merchant streets

→ See all Castle Town guides

Nature 自然

Scenic landscapes, national parks, and natural wonders

item.title: Hidden Castle Towns Near Osaka: 5 Day Trips Most Tourists Miss
item.description: Five historic castle towns within 3 hours of Osaka — including Japan's oldest surviving keep and a castle that floats above the clouds. All doable as day trips.

item.title: Hidden Castle Towns Near Tokyo: 5 Day Trips Off the Tourist Trail
item.description: Five feudal castle towns within day-trip distance of Tokyo — from Little Edo Kawagoe to the samurai streets of Aizu-Wakamatsu. No rental car needed.

item.title: Japan Lighthouse Guide: 7 Hidden Coastal Gems Along Honshu Worth Visiting
item.description: Honshu's most scenic and least-visited lighthouses — from Chiba's 1874 Inubosaki to Shimane's tallest stone tower. All reachable without a car.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Last updated: June 27, 2026

Introduction

Hidden Japan Tokyo (“we,” “us,” or “our”) operates the website hidden-japan.tokyo. This page explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our site.

Information We Collect

Automatically Collected Information

When you visit our site, we may automatically collect:

  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and time spent on each page
  • Referring website
  • General location (country/region level only)

This information is collected through cookies and similar technologies.

item.title: Hidden Temples in Tohoku: 5 Shrines Worth the Trip North
item.description: Five of Tohoku's most atmospheric temples and shrines — from Yamadera's clifftop halls to the 1,400-year-old pilgrimage at Dewa Sanzan. Crowd-free and remarkable.

item.title: Hidden Waterfalls in Japan: 5 Rural Gems Most Tourists Never Find
item.description: Five of Japan's most beautiful hidden waterfalls — tucked into rural valleys and mountain forests far from the tour group circuit. With access tips for each.

item.title: Rural Japan Food: 5 Local Food Experiences Worth Leaving Tokyo For
item.description: Five authentic rural Japanese food experiences you won't find in city restaurants — from Tohoku mountain cuisine to hand-pulled soba in a converted farmhouse.

item.title: Japan's Most Scenic Local Train Rides: 5 Routes Worth the Detour
item.description: Five of Japan's most beautiful local train journeys — coastal cliff lines, highland valleys, and routes where you might be the only foreign passenger on board.

item.title: 5 Hidden Onsen Towns in Japan Away from the Crowds (2026 Guide)
item.description: Five off-the-radar hot spring towns in Japan — including a free riverside rotemburo open 24/7 and a century-old ryokan deep in an Aomori beech forest.
